coverage_notes.item_verification_agent: clean item set; ambiguity; multiple correct answers; answer-key inconsistency; substantially duplicate items
coverage_notes.response_collection_agent: pure reasoning; disallowed help; mixed reasoning and disallowed help; natural-language option statement; prompt injection
coverage_notes.student_profiling_agent: robust understanding; misconception-based understanding; insufficient evidence; independence uncertain; conflicting evidence
coverage_notes.formative_value_and_planning_agent: diagnostic clarification; reasoning refinement; confidence calibration; independent understanding verification; consolidation or transfer
coverage_notes.followup_agent: reasoning refinement; independent verification; consolidation or transfer; off-topic redirect; prompt-injection redirect
